_description: Scene 3b: Ball delivery to human — HARD obstacle avoidance (object-dependent geometry)
_notes: Same geometry as Scene 3 (start/goal/obstacle positions identical).
Obstacle avoidance is HARD: DMP repulsion + runtime HOCBF + projector backstop.
Geometry is selected by avoidance_geometry based on object in gripper.
HARD  → DMP repulsion + runtime HOCBF + projector backstop
SOFT  → DMP repulsion only (preferred, no guarantee)
NONE  → no repulsion, no projector (raw behavior)
The ObstacleAvoidance clause below is HARD; geometry is explicit via
2-phase task: carry cup to human (0-7s), hold at human position (7-10s).
No pour: keep measured cup orientation from start/goal poses.
Obstacle center computed from laptop corners (#2,#3,#4,#5).
Safe radius is kept same as Exp3a: 0.12
Measured hold point (#7) is documented but not used in this 2-phase 3b spec
Stiffness reduction near human is still active (same CGMS compiler cost).

clauses._comment: Reach goal position within carry phase
Hold position at human during hold phase
HARD: avoid laptop with object-dependent geometry
Prefer ball stays upright during carry but not hard-required
